executives.name: John Ciampaglia
executives.background: Mr. Ciampaglia is the Chief Executive Officer of Sprott Asset Management LP and a Senior Managing Director of Sprott Inc. He has more than 25 years of experience in the investment industry and has held senior positions at several Canadian investment firms.

executives.name: Varinder Bhathal
executives.background: Ms. Bhathal is the Chief Financial Officer of Sprott Asset Management LP and a Managing Director of Sprott Inc. She has over 20 years of experience in the financial services industry, specializing in investment funds and corporate finance.

executives.name: Kevin Hibbert
executives.background: Mr. Hibbert is the Chief Financial Officer of Sprott Inc. and has extensive experience in financial reporting and regulatory compliance within the asset management sector.

board_of_directors.name: John Ciampaglia
board_of_directors.background: CEO of Sprott Asset Management LP and Senior Managing Director of Sprott Inc.

board_of_directors.name: Kevin Hibbert
board_of_directors.background: CFO of Sprott Inc. and Managing Director.

board_of_directors.name: Whitney George
board_of_directors.background: CEO of Sprott Inc. and has over 30 years of experience in the investment industry.
